c.d: The range and diversity of live streaming content available on the platform, including sports, entertainment, news, and user-generated streams.
The ease of navigation, design quality, and overall user experience of the app.
The affordability of the service, including subscription fees, availability of free content, and device compatibility.
The presence of interactive elements such as live chat, virtual gifting, and audience engagement tools.
The quality of video streams, including resolution options, buffering times, and overall reliability of the service.
